<b>Hover</b> the icon to temporarily exp: Hover the icon to temporarily expand the hidden area.
Allow triggering expansion by hovering o: Allow triggering expansion by hovering over the area where icons are hidden.
Automatically collapse the bar after a p: Automatically collapse the bar after a period of inactivity.
Expand the bar automatically when hoveri: Expand the bar automatically when hovering over the icon.
Fine-tune the trigger zone size. Positiv: Fine-tune the trigger zone size. Positive values expand it, negative values shrink it.
Found a bug, want to translate, or have: Found a bug, want to translate, or have a feature request? Join us on GitHub.
Limit the number of widgets to hide. Set: Limit the number of widgets to hide. Set to 0 to hide all.
Never hide the system tray widgets.
Wait time (ms) before expanding on hover: Wait time (ms) before expanding on hover.
Whether the bar should be expanded when: Whether the bar should be expanded when the plugin starts.
